name: Shrimp Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Shrimp, Shelled and Deveined, Chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin 1 hour ahead. Into a large bowl, cut the shrimp in half lengthwise.
2. Add all ingredients, except lettuce leaves; toss to mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves.
